caption: A man sits in a podcast studio, wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT" and a gold chain, a black baseball cap, and over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone. In the background, a white banner features the word "HUSTLE" and gold stars, while a screen displays the text "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, his facial expressions shifting slightly and his mouth moving as he talks. He makes small gestures with his right hand, which is partially visible at the bottom of the frame. The camera angle remains static, keeping the man centered as he engages in conversation within the studio environment.
